Title: Background Jobs for TanStack Start with pg-boss by Jamie Davenport
Description: TanStack Start server functions are great for request/response logic, but some work shouldn't block the user. This post walks through wiring pg-boss into a TanStack Start app to handle durable background jobs — with a typed registry, a Nitro plugin, and a fan-out pattern for post-signup flows.

Title: Expert Beginners and Lone Wolves will dominate this early LLM era
Description:
After migrating this blog from a static site generator into Drupal in 2009, I noted:
As a sad side-effect, all the blog comments are gone. Forever. Wiped out. But have no fear, we can start new discussions on many new posts! I archived all the comments from the old 'Thingamablog' version of the blog, but can't repost them here (at least, not with my time constraints... it would just take a nice import script, but I don't have the time for that now).
